docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,030.00 FILED BY DE MELO, RUBENS ALVES AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVIERO, FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION REQUEST HEARING DATE. BY PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-24-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING A PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER.
